title: Review round record
description: One runner invocation over a PR — a scheduling envelope, not an evaluation unit. Rounds halt on a block verdict, skip on budget, or run a single contested rubric, so they are routinely partial; analyse runs, not rounds.

cost_legacy.description: the pre-recost cost, retained when this round's cost was recosted against a fixed price table

cost_recosted.description: true when cost was recomputed from the constituent runs after recosting; cost_legacy holds the original

scoreboard_sha256.description: sha256 of the rendered scoreboard body for this round

scoreboard_blob.description: blobs/ key of the rendered scoreboard body, when archived

duration_s.description: round wall-clock; for reconstructed rounds possibly log-mined (see duration_source)
